channel.title: Access Control on Jacopo Jannone - blog
channel.description: Recent content in Access Control on Jacopo Jannone - blog

item.title: Analysis of magnetic stripe tickets used for public transport in Lombardy, Italy
item.description: The magnetic stripe on a disposable transport ticket might seem a pretty boring and unremarkable piece of technology. Yet, it was able to tickle my curiosity and when I started digging, I found a rabbit hole. Before I could even realize, I was traveling around the Italian Lombardy region with no other aim than collecting tickets to analyze. Here’s everything I found out.
